justification: Material living conditions; pure material gain
Disposable household income and wealth; the core material gain measure
Jobs bundles earnings (G) and security; earnings half to material gain
The job-security half is an agency/capability item (capacity to sustain a livelihood)
Quality of the social support network; the direct social cohesion measure
Education and skills; the capability that converts effort into outcomes (agency)
Civic engagement and governance; voice and influence is agency
Civic participation also builds social cohesion (the participation fabric)
Health status; a core capability underpinning agency

column5: friends and community; supports the social fabric

justification: Subjective wellbeing is the OUTCOME being explained
column5: not a weight; excluded from the mapping
